title: Chinese Doctors Outpace Global Peers in AI Adoption Amid Trust Concerns
description: Chinese Doctors Outpace Global Peers in AI Adoption Amid Trust Concerns - A new survey finds 56% of Chinese clinical staff use artificial intelligence in their work, beating the 49% global average, though widespread skepticism over data accuracy and patient safety remains
content:
More than half of clinical professionals in China now use artificial intelligence in their daily work, outpacing the global average, even as doctors worldwide grapple with skepticism over the technology’s reliability, according to a new report.

title: Sacks: U.S. AI Edge at Risk Amid Chinese Model Advance
description: Former White House AI and cryptocurrency czar David Sacks said Friday that the United States is undermining its competitive advantage in artificial intelligence through excessive regulation, following the release of a new Chinese AI model that reportedly matches top U.S. systems. title: Singer Kate Ceberano reveals shock at deepfake artificial intelligence post showing her crying about late friend Sam Neill
description: ’You were tricked and I kinda think this is just the beginning.’
content:

title: Uncovering multidimensional effects of generative AI on learning
description: A research team consisting of researcher Somi Joo, Professor Changjun Lee and Professor Daeho Lee from the Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU) Department of Artificial Intelligence Convergence have published a study comprehensively analyzing the opportunities and risks of using generative artificial intelligence (GAI) in educational settings. The study examines how students have recently used generative AI in education.
